narrative_beat: Dragao carmesim com sete cabecas caindo do ceu escuro em chamas douradas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a colossal crimson seven-headed dragon cast down from a dark sky wrapped in gold flames
subject.focal_point: the dragon's central crimson head breathing gold fire
subject.secondary: Fallen angelic forms tumble behind the dragon. Distant mountain silhouettes fade to monochrome.

composition.rule: diagonal descent from upper-right to lower-left
composition.foreground: dragon and flames in rich crimson-gold tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white stormy sky and mountains

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, ash particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: ancient serpent that deceives the whole world

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
classical fresco rendering meets cinematic realism, reverent
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
